title: Oliver Brausch
text: Home * People * Oliver Brausch Oliver Brausch [1] Oliver Brausch , a German physicist, computer scientist, and IT-architect. He holds a Ph.D. in physics from University of Bayreuth on the topic of Rayleigh–Bénard convection [2] . As avocational computer chess programmer, Oliver is author of OliThink , an open source chess engine with C and Java versions available [3] , whose evaluation consists almost of material balance and mobility . Oliver's stance to mobility was likely due to his background in statistical physics concerning entropy .
